title: Entendamos a Nmap
tags: hacking, pentest, red team, bug bounty
content: Nmap for Pentester Escaneando toda la red nmap –sP 192.168.1.0/24 //Enviamos paquetes por ARP a toda la red nmap -sn 192.168.1.0/24 –packet-trace // Vemos paquetes por ARP nmap -sn 192.168.1.108 –disable-arp-ping // Paquetes dentro de ARP no visibles Es lo mismo al paso anterior nmap –sn 192.168.1.108 –packet-trace –send-ip Escaneo muy simple pero rapido nmap 10.11.1.111 Nmap ultra rapido nmap 10.11.1.111 –max-retries 1 –min-rate 1000 Obtenemos puertos abiertos nmap -p - -Pn -n 10.10.10.10 Escaneamos puertos especificos nmap -pXX,XX,XX,XX,XX -Pn -sV -n 10.10.10.10 Completo rápido y preciso nmap –top-ports 200 -sV -n –max-retries 2 -Pn –open -iL ips.txt -oA portscan_active Escaneo lento completo con reporte de salida nmap -v -A -p- -Pn –script vuln -oA full 10.11.1.111 Evasión de filtrado de red nmap –source-port 53 -p 5555 10.11.1.111 # If work, set IPTABLES to bind this port iptables -t nat -A POSTROUTING -d 10.11.1.111 -p tcp -j SNAT –to :53 escaneo por UDP nmap 10.11.1.111 -sU nmap -sU -F -Pn -v -d -sC -sV –open –reason -T5 10.11.1.111 Evación de firewal nmap -f nmap --mtu 24 nmap --data-length 30 nmap --source-port 53 Indicaciones de velocidad de nmap –max-rtt-timeout: Time response per probe –script-timeout: Time response per script –host-timeout: Time response for host –open: Avoid detection if filtered or closed –min-rate

content: main header Proyectos personales info . text_color white img :c.jpg back_color lightblue category title Hacking type id_hacking color #150050 title Bash type id_bash color #3F0071 title Python type id_python color #FB2576 list type id_python project_name Markdown project_excerpt Examples img :neo.jpeg img_title img title1 date 2021-03-13 post # Examples This is an example page to display markdown related styles for Mr. Green Jekyll Theme. ### Headings (centered) :data-align=\ center\ # Heading 1 ## Heading 2 ### Heading 3 #### Heading 4 ##### Heading 5Example Project 4444 ###### Heading 6 *** ### Paragraphs #### Paragraph **William Shakespeare** Let me not to the marriage of true minds Admit impediments. Love is not love Which alters when it alteration finds Or bends with the remover to remove. O no it is an ever-fixed mark That looks on tempests and is never shaken; It is the star to every wand'ring barque Whose worth's unknown although his height be taken. Love's not Time's fool though rosy lips and cheeks Within his bending sickle's compass come; Love alters not with his brief hours and weeks But bears it out even to the edge of doom. If this be error and upon me proved I never writ nor no man ever loved. #### Texts Quoted text `Hello world` Bold text **Hello world** Italic text _Hello world_ kbd text <kbd>Hello world</kbd> #### Blockquote > **William Shakespeare** Let me not to the marriage of true minds Admit impediments. Love is not love Which alters when it alteration finds Or bends with the remover to remove. O no it is an ever-fixed mark That looks on tempests and is never shaken; It is the star to every wand'ring barque Whose worth's unknown although his height be taken. Love's not Time's fool though rosy lips and cheeks Within his bending sickle's compass come; Love alters not with his brief hours and weeks But bears it out even to the edge of doom. If this be error and upon me proved I never writ nor no man ever loved. ### Link This is Mr. Green Jekyll Theme(https://github.com/MrGreensWorkshop/MrGreen-JekyllTheme) a simple theme built for Jekyll(https://jekyllrb.com/). ### Picture !such a lovely place(:projects-heading.jpg) ### Picture (centered) !such a lovely place(:project1_thumb.jpg):data-align=\ center\ ### Lists - Apple - Banana - Orange 1. Nombre: Frank Prime Estudios: Ing. en Sistemas Computacionales Certificaciones: No tengo certificaciones por el simple hecho que no tengo dinero para pagarlas, lo siento. Estoy trabajando en ello. Otros estudios: Diplamados con Ctsec Sobre este blog: En este sitio redacto mis pensamientos, conocimientos sobre Informatica a medida que voy aprendiendo cosas nuevas, a si mismo plasmo mis proyectos e ideas personales para ayudar a comprender a otras personas de que va esta tematica.
